action.reasoning: Observation: 10-epoch Sketch-only CLIP fine-tuning improved source validation accuracy but reduced Quickdraw accuracy from 0.1835 to 0.1726, indicating overfitting/misalignment to source Sketch rather than target Quickdraw. Analysis: target performance likely peaks very early; source validation is not a reliable checkpoint-selection signal for Quickdraw. Decision: train a 1-epoch full fine-tune with the same validated setup and submit it to map the early-training target curve around the current best 2-epoch checkpoint.
